data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for external directory links to internal users/subjects.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement regarding external directory links to internal users/subjects. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied or identifies any gaps. The prior steps focus on user creation and booking processes, which do not address the specific need for external directory links, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: External directory links to internal users/subjects are not validated or present.
